display_name: the caves · level 2 · the drowned corridor

W.label: deep water · you can see the passage at the bottom but you can't walk through it

U.label: the underwater passage · Ollie could hold his breath through it · or Ford could tide-time it

l.label: a wall lantern · someone keeps this lit too

n.label: an old length of coiled rope · dry · you could take it

s.label: words scratched into the rock at Sam's eye level · someone else once stood here

P.label: a passage climbing up and around · leads deeper into the cave system

p.label: back up to the chamber of barrels

notes: Caves level 2 · the drowned corridor.  A pool at center with a submerged passage at its bottom that leads to level 3.  Sam needs Ollie (HOLD YOUR BREATH) to swim through, OR Ford (MARINE LOGIC) to tide-time when the water level drops enough to wade.  An old length of dry rope on the sand.  A wall scratch at eye level · words from someone who stood here first.
